texto: The most romantic thing someone did was surprise me at the airport, after being away for 3 months in Los Angeles. You always see people with signs, and you're like, 'Isn't that lovely?' and then you see your own name on one - that isn't a taxi driver's! I was very impressed.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ophelia Lovibond: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “The most romantic thing someone did was surprise me at the airport, after being away for 3 months…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, surprise, me pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de me e people.
